title: 10 Herbal Creams For Tickling Throat
description: Rosmarinus officinalis creams contains rosinic acid, bornyl acetate, and camphor as its active constituents. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and calm an itchy or tickly throat. The camphor in Rosmarinus officinalis creams has a numbing effect, which can provide quick relief from discomfort. The antiseptic properties of rosinic acid and bornyl acetate help to reduce inflammation and kill bacteria that may be causing the irritation. ...
